name: deleteMessageReaction
description: Use this method to remove a reaction from a message in a group or a supergroup chat. The bot must have the 'can_delete_messages' administrator right in the chat

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose reaction will be removed, if the reaction was added by a user

parameters.name: actor_chat_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the chat whose reaction will be removed, if the reaction was added by a chat
